description.value:
Cinderlands relic (Appendix 5; the OCR ate its price line — costed from construction at 12,000 gp → 1,200 gp). A band of pumice and hardened ash, strong as steel. Invested.

  • Wreath of flame (free action): up to 10 rounds per day (nonconsecutive). While burning: any creature that hits you with a melee Strike from within your reach takes @Damage[2d6[fire]].
  • Cold-bane reflex: if you would take cold damage while rounds remain, the wreath auto-ignites (1 round) and grants resistance 10 to that cold.

publication.title: Pathfinder: Curse of the Crimson Throne (PF2e conversion, private)
